overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along the exterior of a futuristic cyberpunk high-rise building during a rainy night. The camera moves smoothly along glass walkways and balconies, transitioning from a waterfront view to an enclosed corridor and finally to an open urban overlook with towering skyscrapers and neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront balcony with glass railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated balcony overlooking the water, with heavy rain falling around the glass railing

entered.detail: transparent glass safety barrier along the edge of the balcony
bright orange-pink neon light running vertically along the building edge
dark water body with city lights reflecting on the surface
distant futuristic cityscape with scattered lights across the horizon
tall building exterior with reflective glass windows and steel framework

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated balcony overlooking a dark bay. A bright orange neon strip illuminates the left side while glass railings line the right edge. The distant city skyline glows across the water as the camera moves steadily forward along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed walkway along building exterior with glass walls

events.description: moves from open waterfront balcony into enclosed building walkway, water view disappears behind building structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the building exterior under the shelter of an overhang, passing by glass windows revealing interior room spaces

entered.detail: illuminated interior spaces visible through the glass windows of the building
exposed steel beams and girders supporting the building exterior

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into a more enclosed walkway where the building's glass facade dominates the view. Interior rooms are visible through the windows on the left, while steel structural elements frame the path. The water view is now obscured by the building structure as the rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban overlook with view of cylindrical tower and street below

events.description: exits enclosed walkway into open overlook revealing cylindrical tower and panoramic city street view below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated path with the massive cylindrical tower on the left and a view of the city street visible far below

entered.detail: tall cylindrical skyscraper with blue vertical lighting strips and glass exterior
urban street visible multiple stories below with vehicle lights and street illumination
large illuminated advertising screen displaying graphics on the distant building

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban overlook dominated by a massive cylindrical tower with blue lighting on the left. The camera moves along the elevated walkway with the glass building now on the right, revealing a sprawling cityscape below with streets, vehicles, and distant neon signage through the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked high-rise exterior that transitions from a quiet waterfront balcony to a sprawling urban overlook. It begins on an elevated walkway overlooking a dark bay, where a bright orange neon strip casts a glow against the distant city skyline. As the camera moves forward, the open view of the water is gradually obscured as the path shifts into a more enclosed corridor framed by steel structures and the building's glass facade. The scene then opens wide again, moving past a massive cylindrical tower with blue lighting to reveal a vast, rainy cityscape below. Finally, the camera glides along the elevated edge, exposing a dense network of streets, vehicles, and shimmering neon signage stretching into the night.
